name: sharda-setu
description: Sharda Setu — accessible learning with online education API

scripts.build:data: node backend/build-education.js && node backend/build-it-education.js && node backend/generate-fallback.js && node backend/build-question-bank.js && node -e "const q=require('./backend/data/quizzes.json');require('fs').writeFileSync('backend/data/quiz-fallback.js','window.QUIZ_FALLBACK='+JSON.stringify(q,null,2)+';')"
